creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'll try to commit this port as well.

BTW, it would be nice if you could submit your patches as shell archives (shars) or SVN diffs. Patch files generated with Git does not integrate nicely with patch(1) and SVN repositories (or maybe I am missing something). Related chapter in the Porter's Handbook: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#porting-submitting 

Cheers :)
